title: Demo Lichdom
description: Command your skeleton army to demolish buildings as a modern necromancer! Pure HTML5 strategy action with emoji-powered graphics.

maker.name: MattyJacks
maker.bio: Founder of 4weird Games and creator of Demo Lichdom. I specialize in creating quirky browser games that blend unconventional concepts with polished gameplay. As a necromancer demolition contractor in this game, you embody the weird spirit that drives all 4weird creations - unexpected combinations that just work.

instructions: You are a necromancer demolition contractor. Use WASD to move, CLICK to cast skull spells, and press S to summon skeletons (-25 mana each). Command your undead army to destroy all buildings. Level up to unlock powerful upgrades.
